## Validation

- [ ] Frontend tests and production build
- [ ] Backend tests and formatting
- [ ] Dependency audits
- [ ] Public-evidence and secret scans
- [ ] Documentation links and YAML validation
- [ ] `git diff --check`

## Privacy and public evidence

- [ ] No personal data, private exports, credentials, internal URLs, hostnames, server paths, or deployment topology
- [ ] Screenshots use synthetic or explicitly approved data and contain no metadata
- [ ] Third-party assets have documented rights or attribution
